annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window drag handling: KWin script calls dragStarted/dragMoved/dragStopped; daemon returns snap geometry. Uses double for window rect (KWin QML) and int for cursor/modifiers.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Called when a window drag begins. Coordinates are double (KWin QML).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Qt::MouseButtons flags for the button(s) that started the drag (0=None, 2=Right, 4=Middle, 8=Back, 16=Forward, etc.). Used for activation-by-mouse-button.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Called while the window is being dragged. Cursor position (int), keyboard modifiers and current mouse buttons (Qt flags).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Qt::MouseButtons flags currently held (0=None, 2=Right, 4=Middle, etc.). Used to toggle overlay when activation is set to a mouse button (same as modifier: hold button during drag to show zones).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Forward scroll delta to the zone selector during drag. Reserved for future use when KWin exposes pointer axis events to effects.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Vertical scroll delta in 1/8 degree units (positive=up, negative=down). Standard wheel tick is ±120.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Called when the drag ends. Returns snap rectangle and whether to apply it (shouldSnap). cursorX/Y are the cursor position at release (for release screen detection). modifiers: Qt::KeyboardModifiers at release — used for Snap Assist triggers (when always-on is off).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Qt::MouseButtons at release. With modifiers, used for Snap Assist triggers: when any trigger held, enables Snap Assist for this drop (when always-enabled is off).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if KWin should apply the snap geometry.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen name where the drag was released (cursor position). Use for auto-fill on drop.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: If true with shouldSnap: apply only width/height; keep window at current position (drag-to-unsnap). Float-toggle shortcut restores full x/y/w/h.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Cancel the current snap operation (e.g. user pressed Escape).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Called when a window is closed during or after a drag operation. Cleans up any drag state associated with this window.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the zone geometry under the cursor changes during drag. KWin effect applies the geometry immediately for snap-on-hover behavior.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the cursor leaves all zones during drag and the window was snapped. KWin effect applies pre-snap size immediately (restore-size-only at current position).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted asynchronously after a successful snap when Snap Assist is active. Carries the list of empty zones on the release screen so the effect can show a window picker without blocking the fast dragStopped reply path. The effect discards this if a new drag has already started.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen where the window was snapped.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of EmptyZoneEntry structs for the window picker.
